query:
CREATE TABLE `admin_credentials` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`email` varchar(320) NOT NULL,
	`passwordHash` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `admin_credentials_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `admin_credentials_email_unique` UNIQUE(`email`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 38BqB1RYsyJpQAj.root --database gZ92zyhVJEHyGACHaMfmui --execute CREATE TABLE `admin_credentials` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`email` varchar(320) NOT NULL,
	`passwordHash` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `admin_credentials_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `admin_credentials_email_unique` UNIQUE(`email`)
);
